description: Named 2D profile specification for template shapes and extrusions. Specifies a profile shape by name (e.g. rectangle, star-5pt, circle). Used as an argument to templateshape2d() and extrude3d().
utility: Specify a named 2D profile for shapes and extrusions

examples.expression: ts_1 = templateshape2d(at(7,34), view(16,23.7), profile2d("rectangle"), c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
ts_1 = templateshape2d(at(4,7), view(13.5,18.7), profile2d("star-5pt"), c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))

p = profile2d("rectangle")
E = extrude3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), p, 5, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
